arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals what's helping Liverpool stars in Premier League title fight
arts.sum: Liverpool face Manchester City at the top of the table with the possibility of ending the Premier League champions hopes of a fifth straight league title a real probability at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Manchester City: Best bets for all Sunday’s Premier League games
arts.sum: Our betting expert with punts for massive clash at Anfield, Chelsea against Aston Villa, Manchester United v Everton and Fulham's trip to Tottenham PLUS a Serie A shout

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Liverpool transfer admission as Ibrahima Konate replacement plan shared
arts.sum: The Liverpool head coach talked up Joe Gomez and Jarell Quansah ahead of a potential return against Manchester City on Sunday

arts.ttl: Phil Foden sheds light on what Pep Guardiola is really like in the dressing room - as Catalan manager attempts to halt Man City's decline ahead of crunch clash with title rivals Liverpool
arts.sum: It's City's worst run of form since 2006 and the worst sequence of Guardiola's 16-year managerial career, with the Champions facing a daunting trip to Anfield on Sunday.

arts.ttl: 'The impact of defeat is massive' - what to look out for in Liverpool v Man City
arts.sum: BBC Sport previews Sunday's massive Premier League title game between Liverpool and Manchester City at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola labelled Phil Foden incident 'unacceptable' in X-rated dressing-room blast
arts.sum: Phil Foden and Pep Guardiola clashed as Manchester City slipped up against Crystal Palace last season, with a new documentary showing a furious rant the manager launched at the Englishman

arts.ttl: Guardiola asks for chance to turn Man City form around
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says he has asked the Manchester City hierarchy for a chance to turn the club's form around, but will leave if he fails to do so.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals he relishes Liverpool's difficult games and insists 'it's helped' cut out complacency as Dutch boss prepares for Man City showdown
arts.sum: The hard-fought nature of Liverpool's victories under Arne Slot is preventing complacency seeping in at the runaway Premier League leaders.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits Man City's dire run is keeping him up at night - as under-pressure boss claims his title rivals are 'laughing' at the four-in-a-row champions
arts.sum: Five defeats and a draw is the worst sequence of the Catalan's managerial career. And things do not get any easier for City, who visit league leaders Liverpool on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: If I can’t reverse Manchester City slide then I have to go
arts.sum: Guardiola takes his struggling side to Liverpool on Sunday.
